title: Three Cheers for Love
writer: John Francis Larkin, George Marion Jr., Eddie Moran
actors: Eleanore Whitney, Robert Cummings, William Frawley
plot: Charles Dormant, head of the Miracle Pictures Corporation, whose motto is "If it's a good picture, it's a miracle," is convinced by his wife Consuelo to send his daughter, Sharon, who is known as Skippy, to boarding school. Skippy is
